occupation_title: Adult Basic Education, Adult Secondary Education, and English as a Second Language Instructors
occupation_definition: Teach or instruct out-of-school youths and adults in basic education, literacy, or English as a Second Language classes, or in classes for earning a high school equivalency credential.
